name: Upholstered Entry Bench with slatted Shelf Cream Boucle - Threshold™
description:
Keep shoes off the floor and the entryway uncluttered this Upholstered Entry Bench with slatted Shelf from Threshold™. This rectangular bench is designed with a brown finish, and features a padded seat wrapped in cream-color boucle upholstery and a slatted bottom shelf for added visual interest. The upholstered bench provides a comfy spot in your entryway, while the slatted shelf helps keep your footwear organized.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
